mapper.select: SELECT SUM(waiting) AS waitingCount, SUM(success) AS successCount, SUM(failed) AS failedCount, SUM(waiting + success + failed) AS totalCount FROM ( SELECT 1 AS waiting, 0 AS success, 0 AS failed FROM MZBRMSENDTRAN WHERE REQ_DTM LIKE CONCAT(TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), '%') UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS waiting, CASE WHEN RSLT_CD IN ('0000', '200') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS success, CASE WHEN RSLT_CD NOT IN ('0000', '200') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS failed FROM MZBRMSENDLOG WHERE REQ_DTM LIKE CONCAT(TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), '%') ) t

SELECT COALESCE(MSG_TYPE, '알수없음') AS msgType, COALESCE(REQ_DEPT_CD, '알수없음') AS reqDeptCd, SUM(waiting) AS waitingCount, SUM(success) AS successCount, SUM(failed) AS failedCount, SUM(waiting + success + failed) AS totalCount FROM ( SELECT MSG_TYPE, REQ_DEPT_CD, 1 AS waiting, 0 AS success, 0 AS failed FROM MZBRMSENDTRAN WHERE REQ_DTM LIKE CONCAT(TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), '%') UNION ALL SELECT MSG_TYPE, REQ_DEPT_CD, 0 AS waiting, CASE WHEN RSLT_CD IN ('0000', '200') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS success, CASE WHEN RSLT_CD NOT IN ('0000', '200') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS failed FROM MZBRMSENDLOG WHERE REQ_DTM LIKE CONCAT(TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), '%') ) t GROUP BY MSG_TYPE, REQ_DEPT_CD ORDER BY msgType, reqDeptCd
